title: mimo2codex Desktop
tagline: Run mimo2codex in the background. Tray icon. One-click admin UI. No terminal needed.

notReleasedYet.title: Desktop builds not yet released
notReleasedYet.detail: We haven't shipped a desktop release yet. For now, install the CLI:

noMatchPlatform.title: Your platform isn't auto-detected
noMatchPlatform.detail: Pick a build from "Other platforms" below.

bg.title: Runs in the background
bg.detail: No terminal window to keep open. Closes to tray, not the dock.

tray.title: One-click admin
tray.detail: Open settings, view logs, restart sidecar — all from the tray menu.

autostart.title: Launch at boot (optional)
autostart.detail: Toggle "Start on system boot" from the tray; ready before you open Codex.

security.title: First launch will show a security warning
security.mac: macOS: right-click the app → Open → confirm (bypasses Gatekeeper for unsigned apps).
security.sha: These are expected — desktop builds aren't code-signed yet. Verify the SHA256 above matches the file you downloaded for safety.

cliHint: Prefer the command line? npm install -g mimo2codex
